safestFixPlan: If Render backend should serve the website, attach fimamacro.com and www.fimamacro.com to the fima-backend Render service and update IONOS DNS records to Render's required custom-domain targets.
If IONOS should remain the primary website host, deploy the v1.0.127 public tree to the IONOS web root.
If a separate static site/web service owns fimamacro.com, identify that service/repo and apply the v1.0.127 public tree there.
Do not treat this as a cache-only issue until routing/deploy target is corrected.
After fixing routing/deploy target, rerun Priority 2H live website verification.
nextRecommendedStep: Priority 2J: choose and apply the primary-domain hosting fix outside runtime flows, then rerun read-only live website verification.
